label: S60: vaultsparked CSP clearance + homepage circular element fix
topWin: Diagnosed that propagate-csp.mjs overwrites per-page hashes on all non-SKIP_DIRS pages — externalization was the only sustainable fix; cleared all 3 CSP violations blocking the vaultsparked checkout flow
topGap: Homepage still perceived as 'the same' after two rounds of visual changes; glow/color adjustments alone are insufficient — structural layout change needed

security: vaultsparked checkout IIFE externalized to vaultsparked-checkout.js
inline gift button event handlers replaced with addEventListener
visual: homepage energy arc circles replaced with blur-filtered diffuse hero glows
gold text-shadow on Is Sparked. heading

ignisNote: S60 revealed a systemic CSP architecture gap — propagate-csp.mjs treats vaultsparked like any other page despite its custom nav and unique inline JS needs; adding it to SKIP_DIRS would prevent future overwrites.
